ModMetaData.name: [RealRim] Heaters
ModMetaData.author: SIGSEGV111
ModMetaData.description:
[RealRim] Heaters makes electrical room heaters behave like actual power-hungry resistive heaters instead of tiny miracle boxes that somehow bully whole colonies into shirtsleeve weather on what amounts to a desk lamp's power budget.
Vanilla's numbers are wildly generous: a standard heater pushes a surprising amount of heat for only 175 W, which makes base heating feel oddly magical instead of industrial. This mod drags those values back toward something that at least feels electrically painful.
Changes included: - Vanilla Heater: 175 W -> 2500 W. - WallStuff Wall Heater: scaled to match its higher heat push. - Additional electrical room heaters using the same standard TempControl power model are scaled linearly by heat push when their heat values match one of the supported tiers in these patches.
The result is simple: if a heater shoves more heat into a room, it should draw more power from the grid. No free lunch. No pocket fusion hidden in a steel box. Just honest, brutal, colony-killing winter electricity bills.
